summary: Comprehensive testing of Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) for new 'buchhaltung' role. All 16 backend API tests passed. Frontend verified: Navigation filtering, read-only restrictions on Rechnungen/Aufträge/Kunden pages, full access to Buchhaltung page, role badge display, and default redirect to /buchhaltung.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login with admin/admin123 returns role=admin
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with h.bolanka/Buch$2026!Grau returns role=buchhaltung
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with invalid credentials returns 401
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns role=admin for admin user
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns role=buchhaltung for h.bolanka
Backend: Buchhaltung can access GET /api/customers (read-only)
Backend: Buchhaltung can access GET /api/orders (read-only)
Backend: Buchhaltung can access GET /api/invoices (read-only)
Backend: Buchhaltung can access GET /api/buchhaltung/buchungen (full access)
Backend: Buchhaltung can access GET /api/invoices/overdue (Mahnwesen)
Backend: Admin can access GET /api/stats (dashboard)
Backend: Admin can access GET /api/anfragen
Backend: Admin can access GET /api/quotes
Backend: Admin can access GET /api/articles
Backend: Admin can access GET /api/settings
Backend: Admin can access GET /api/users
Frontend: Buchhaltung user redirected to /buchhaltung by default
Frontend: Role badge shows 'Buchhaltung – h.bolanka' in sidebar
Frontend: Navigation shows only Kunden, Aufträge, Rechnungen, Buchhaltung, Mahnwesen for buchhaltung
Frontend: Navigation hides Dashboard, Anfragen, E-Mail, Einsatzplanung, Angebote, Artikel, Kundenportale, Website-Integration, Einstellungen for buchhaltung
Frontend: Rechnungen page hides 'Neue Rechnung' button for buchhaltung (readOnly)
Frontend: Rechnungen page hides Edit/Delete buttons for buchhaltung (readOnly)
Frontend: Rechnungen page shows PDF Download button for buchhaltung
Frontend: Aufträge page hides Edit/Delete/Create Invoice buttons for buchhaltung (readOnly)
Frontend: Kunden page hides 'Neuer Kunde' button for buchhaltung (readOnly)
Frontend: Kunden page hides Edit/Delete buttons for buchhaltung (readOnly)
Frontend: Buchhaltung page has full functionality (Neue Buchung, CSV Export visible)
Frontend: Admin user redirected to /dashboard by default
Frontend: Admin has all 14 navigation items visible
Frontend: Admin Rechnungen page shows 'Neue Rechnung' button
Frontend: Admin Rechnungen page shows Edit/Delete buttons
critical_code_review_comments: Navigation.jsx correctly filters nav items based on user role using getUserRole() and allNavItems.roles array
App.js correctly wraps admin-only routes in role === 'admin' conditional
InvoicesPage, OrdersPage, CustomersPage correctly use readOnly prop to hide edit/delete/create buttons
auth.py correctly includes role in JWT token and returns role in /auth/me endpoint
Default redirect logic correctly sends buchhaltung to /buchhaltung and admin to /dashboard
seed_data_creation: User h.bolanka with role 'buchhaltung' already exists in database.
context_for_next_testing_agent: RBAC feature fully tested. Two user roles: admin (full access) and buchhaltung (restricted). Buchhaltung role can see: Kunden (read-only), Aufträge (read-only + PDF), Rechnungen (read-only + PDF), Buchhaltung (full), Mahnwesen. Cannot see: Dashboard, Anfragen, E-Mail, Einsatzplanung, Angebote, Artikel, Kundenportale, Website-Integration, Einstellungen. Role badge shows 'Buchhaltung – {username}' in sidebar. Default redirect: buchhaltung -> /buchhaltung, admin -> /dashboard. Navigation filtering uses getUserRole() from localStorage user object.
